positive: A detailed, intricate celestial and botanical pattern mandala centered composition, featuring stylized constellations woven seamlessly with delicate, exotic flora (e.g., monstera leaves, jasmine vines, glowing moon blossoms). The design should employ strong, clean silhouettes against a gradient background, utilizing deep indigo, royal purple, gold metallic accents, and emerald green. The style must be highly ornamental, geometric, and graphic, suitable for direct apparel screen printing. Compositionally balanced, with the main subject occupying the central area. High contrast and vibrant color saturation. Symmetry is key. Line art details, engraving aesthetic, minimalist black ink outline on a rich background.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, brand, artifact, cropped, worst quality, blurry, grainy, jpeg artifacts, excess details, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photorealistic
